name: Documentation
summary: Repository entry docs, architecture docs, execution docs, glossary, status, handoff, maturity maps, gap registers, and documentation drift discipline.
invariants: HealthOS is the system; HealthOScaffold is the historical construction repository/foundation phase.
Official docs remain canonical over derived memory and construction records.
Docs must not invent capability, production readiness, provider behavior, CLI behavior, or clinical authority.
Current nomenclature must remain consistent: Session Runtime, MSR, HealthOS Forge MCP, healthos-forge-mcp.
allowedWork: Update architecture, execution, tracker, handoff, README, and agent instruction docs.
Correct stale terminology and maturity claims.
Record validation evidence and residual gaps honestly.
Maintain documentation-only construction metadata when scoped.
forbiddenWork: Leave stale references or inconsistent nomenclature.
Claim docs prove executable behavior without source or smoke evidence.
knownGaps: Derived memory can lag official docs and must not be treated as canonical.
Older prompt and planning docs may contain historical task IDs that require careful context before edits.
notes: Documentation-only changes still require tracking updates when they complete a work unit.
Territory records are metadata and do not replace this documentation territory.
